title: solanum dulcamara var. rupestre
intro: Solanum dulcamara var. rupestre, commonly known as climbing nightshade or bitter nightshade, is a variety of the Solanum dulcamara plant, characterized by its woody stems and purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Solanum dulcamara var. rupestre include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal remedies, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
